subject: A small dark fae creature — a faerie with large mottled wings — crouching forward in a lunge, grinning with glowing amber eyes, clutching a dark orb with an eye-like motif on its surface, set against a murky woodland of twisted bark and roots
description: A compact, grey-skinned faerie crouches in a forward lunge against a backdrop of gnarled dark wood. Large insect-style wings — mottled dusty brown and green — spread behind the figure. The faerie grins with glowing amber-yellow eyes, its expression conspiratorial and predatory rather than threatening outright. In one hand it clutches a rounded dark orb marked with an eye-like motif; a red cord or tendril trails from it. The surrounding environment is deep murky woodland — twisted bark, heavy roots, and a violet-purple wash in the lower corners. The overall palette is dark greens, blacks, charcoal, and earthy browns with the glowing eyes as the sole warm light source. The posture and expression read as a servant mid-delivery of something unpleasant on their master's behalf — impish, leering, feral.
foreground: Dark faerie figure crouching forward, clutching a dark orb with an eye motif, wings spread, grinning
background: Twisted gnarled bark and roots, murky woodland, violet-purple shadow wash in lower corners
emotion: Conspiratorial grin, glowing eyes wide — impish servitude, feral eagerness, the look of someone gleefully doing their master's dirty work
